title: Product Marketing Specialist
skills: Collaborate with Product Management team to understand the competitive landscape and drive demand in line with business goals. Executes client acquisition and retention strategies to drive business growth.

Supports market and trend research efforts to identify new opportunities and ensure products and messages are properly targeted. Gathers insights to influence business decisions and shape Product Management strategy.
Works with guidance to craft compelling content to drive product awareness and purchase.
Works with guidance to create compelling content to ensure that sales have the knowledge required to effectively sell product offerings. Partners with sales to foster a continuous feedback loop.
Contributes to business success by performing other tasks as required
Read and follow the Underwriters Laboratories Code of Conduct, and follow all physical and digital security practices
Generally, 3-5 years or more of related experience or demonstrated competency.
Strong writing and presentation skills.
Collaboration Basic project planning and management.
Customer-centric orientation.
Interviewing.
Budget tracking.
Analytical skills.
We are a global team that conducts business with English as our primary common language, so candidate must be a fluent English speaker and writer.
Able to understand technical and scientific issues and to translate complex information for nonscientific audiences.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office and experience managing and/or using a wide array of internal communication tools.
description:
About the job

Job Description

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing Product Management team within UL Solutions Retail and Consumer Product team. We are a proactive and dynamic group, with strong growth goals and an equally strong work ethic! Bring your skills to this team and let's grow together! As part of global Product Management team, support the business success of new services and drive growth and improvement of existing service portfolio. Collaborate and support across the product management team, with exposure across retail focused initiatives as well as sustainability focused initiatives.

Works independently; receives minimal guidance to execute go-to-market plans including: crafting messaging that attracts and converts prospects and leads; creating sales materials to facilitate positive client experience; and executing against launch plans that outline in detail how products are promoted and sold.

Responsibilities


Collaborate with Product Management team to understand the competitive landscape and drive demand in line with business goals. Executes client acquisition and retention strategies to drive business growth. 
Supports market and trend research efforts to identify new opportunities and ensure products and messages are properly targeted. Gathers insights to influence business decisions and shape Product Management strategy. 
Works with guidance to craft compelling content to drive product awareness and purchase. 
Works with guidance to create compelling content to ensure that sales have the knowledge required to effectively sell product offerings. Partners with sales to foster a continuous feedback loop. 
Contributes to business success by performing other tasks as required
Read and follow the Underwriters Laboratories Code of Conduct, and follow all physical and digital security practices


Qualifications

MINIMUM KNOWLEDGE PREFERRED.


Generally, 3-5 years or more of related experience or demonstrated competency. 


Minimum Skills Preferred.


Strong writing and presentation skills. 
Collaboration Basic project planning and management. 
Customer-centric orientation. 
Interviewing. 
Budget tracking. 
Analytical skills. 
We are a global team that conducts business with English as our primary common language, so candidate must be a fluent English speaker and writer. 


Minimum Abilities Preferred.


Able to understand technical and scientific issues and to translate complex information for nonscientific audiences. 
Proficiency in Microsoft Office and experience managing and/or using a wide array of internal communication tools. 


About Us

A global leader in applied safety science, UL Solutions (NYSE: ULS) transforms safety, security and sustainability challenges into opportunities for customers in more than 110 countries. UL Solutions delivers testing, inspection and certification services, together with software products and advisory offerings, that support our customers’ product innovation and business growth. The UL Mark serves as a recognized symbol of trust in our customers’ products and reflects an unwavering commitment to advancing our safety mission. We help our customers innovate, launch new products and services, navigate global markets and complex supply chains, and grow sustainably and responsibly into the future. Our science is your advantage.

About The Team

We may not help develop smart homes of the future, inspect the New Year’s Eve ball or work in state-of-the-art labs… but we do tell people about it. It’s our brand, stories and campaigns that drive the growth of our business, open us up to new opportunities and let the world know how we’re making a difference. Our full-service team, which includes award-winning in-house creatives, collaborates to share ideas, tell our story and connect with people around the world. Join our team and spread the word about an organization that’s working at the forefront of innovation to shape a safer world.

title: Marketing Specialist / Copywriter
skills: Strong Writing and Copywriting skills, including the ability to create clear, persuasive content across multiple formats.
Experience drafting and managing Press Releases as part of broader communication or PR efforts.
Excellent Communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively in a fully remote, international team.
Proficiency in Marketing fundamentals, including digital marketing concepts and campaign support.
Attention to detail with solid Proofreading and editing abilities to ensure error-free, on-brand content.
Familiarity with content management systems, email marketing tools, and social media platforms is beneficial.
Ability to analyze content performance metrics and adjust messaging to improve engagement and conversion.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
description:
About the job

Company Description Simply Trabajo is dedicated to connecting candidates with fully remote roles at companies around the world. The organization believes that career opportunities are not limited by geography and that talent can bridge distances between professionals and international employers. Simply Trabajo supports businesses in finding the right candidates across sales, administrative, and HR functions, as well as in marketing, operations, customer service, and technical support. Applicants can expect to collaborate with diverse global teams and contribute to meaningful, long-term remote work relationships.
Role Description The Marketing Specialist / Copywriter is a full-time remote role responsible for crafting clear, compelling copy that supports marketing and branding initiatives. Day-to-day tasks include writing and editing content for digital campaigns, social media, email marketing, landing pages, and other marketing materials. The role involves drafting press releases and promotional content, ensuring consistent messaging across channels, and proofreading all copy for accuracy and tone. The Marketing Specialist / Copywriter will collaborate with marketing and cross-functional teams to develop communication strategies, optimize content for engagement, and support lead-generation efforts. This role requires proactive communication in a remote environment and effective time management to handle multiple projects and deadlines.
Qualifications
 
Strong Writing and Copywriting skills, including the ability to create clear, persuasive content across multiple formats.
Experience drafting and managing Press Releases as part of broader communication or PR efforts.
Excellent Communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively in a fully remote, international team.
Proficiency in Marketing fundamentals, including digital marketing concepts and campaign support.
Attention to detail with solid Proofreading and editing abilities to ensure error-free, on-brand content.
Familiarity with content management systems, email marketing tools, and social media platforms is beneficial.
Ability to analyze content performance metrics and adjust messaging to improve engagement and conversion.
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

title: AI Engineering I - Marketing
skills: Contribute to the design and development of AI-powered platforms and systems, working alongside senior engineers on complex initiatives.
Own end-to-end delivery of complex projects, from problem discovery and system design through production rollout and iteration.
Build AI-driven features, intelligent automation, and agentic systems that enhance customer experiences and improve team productivity.
Embed AI capabilities into existing team workflows, products, and processes, ensuring solutions integrate naturally
Integrate AI capabilities into customer-facing products, internal tools, and operational workflows.
Build full-stack components spanning backend services, APIs, data layers, and frontend interfaces.
Translate business and operational problems into maintainable, AI-enabled technical solutions with guidance from senior team members.
Apply systems thinking to ensure reliability, performance, and security across platforms.
Collaborate with engineers, teams, and stakeholders across the company to understand requirements and deliver impactful solutions.
Participate in production support and incident response for team-owned systems, learning operational best practices.
Engage in code reviews and knowledge sharing to continuously improve skills and contribute to team growth.
Familiarity with Braze or similar consumer facing CRM platforms and/or various B2C digital marketing channels like affiliate, CTV, paid social, paid search, GEO/SEO, DSP.
1–3 years of professional experience in software engineering, AI engineering, platform engineering, or related roles.
Hands-on experience designing, building, and shipping AI-powered systems into production environments.
Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and frontend frameworks such as React.
Proven experience designing and owning production-grade full-stack systems.
Experience working with distributed systems, internal platforms, or complex data workflows.
Demonstrated experience working with Claude or equivalent large language model tools is required; candidates must be comfortable leveraging AI to enhance productivity, research, and communication.
Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous problem spaces and drive solutions with minimal direction.
Exposure to building AI-powered platforms or products, including contributing to architectural decisions.
Foundational knowledge of core machine learning and data science principles, including supervised/unsupervised learning, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Familiarity with transformer architectures (BERT, GPT, etc.) and basic understanding of attention mechanisms, tokenization, and fine-tuning concepts.
Exposure to embeddings and vector representations, including text embeddings and similarity search concepts; interest in vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, or similar).
Familiarity with NLP techniques such as text classification, named entity recognition, or semantic search.

Familiarity with real-world agentic frameworks workflow engines (e.g., in-house automation platforms, langchain/graph, n8n, Make, or similar), with a solid understanding of how they work under the hood.
Experience developing AI-assisted or agentic systems that interact with tools, data, or workflows.
Familiarity with cloud-native development using AWS.
Experience with containerized systems and orchestration tools such as Docker and Kubernetes.
Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and modern development workflows (e.g., GitLab).
Experience with Golang is a plus (or willingness to learn).

You have relentlessly high standards - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.
You’re not bound by convention - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do things
You need action - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.
You earn trust - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.
description:
About the job

The salary range for this role is 2,500 - 3,333 USD per month (Gross in USD) 

About Sezzle:

With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping!

About the Role: 

We are seeking a talented and motivated AI Engineer I who is best in class, with a high IQ and a high EQ. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with strong prospects for continued growth and increased ownership.

As an AI Engineer I on the Applied AI team, you will contribute to the development of platforms and systems that power Sezzle's AI-driven capabilities. Your work will span initiatives such as building AI-powered features, developing intelligent automation and agentic systems, and embedding AI solutions into customer-facing products, internal tools, and operational workflows.

You will work closely with senior engineers and cross-functional teams to identify opportunities where AI can drive meaningful impact—whether that's enhancing the customer experience, improving decision-making, or automating complex workflows. This role is ideal for engineers early in their AI careers who want hands-on exposure to production-grade AI systems, with opportunities to grow into greater ownership and technical leadership over time.

What You'll Do:


Contribute to the design and development of AI-powered platforms and systems, working alongside senior engineers on complex initiatives.
Own end-to-end delivery of complex projects, from problem discovery and system design through production rollout and iteration.
Build AI-driven features, intelligent automation, and agentic systems that enhance customer experiences and improve team productivity.
Embed AI capabilities into existing team workflows, products, and processes, ensuring solutions integrate naturally
Integrate AI capabilities into customer-facing products, internal tools, and operational workflows.
Build full-stack components spanning backend services, APIs, data layers, and frontend interfaces.
Translate business and operational problems into maintainable, AI-enabled technical solutions with guidance from senior team members.
Apply systems thinking to ensure reliability, performance, and security across platforms.
Collaborate with engineers, teams, and stakeholders across the company to understand requirements and deliver impactful solutions.
Participate in production support and incident response for team-owned systems, learning operational best practices.
Engage in code reviews and knowledge sharing to continuously improve skills and contribute to team growth.
Familiarity with Braze or similar consumer facing CRM platforms and/or various B2C digital marketing channels like affiliate, CTV, paid social, paid search, GEO/SEO, DSP.


What We'll Look For:


1–3 years of professional experience in software engineering, AI engineering, platform engineering, or related roles.
Hands-on experience designing, building, and shipping AI-powered systems into production environments.
Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and frontend frameworks such as React.
Proven experience designing and owning production-grade full-stack systems.
Experience working with distributed systems, internal platforms, or complex data workflows.
Demonstrated experience working with Claude or equivalent large language model tools is required; candidates must be comfortable leveraging AI to enhance productivity, research, and communication.
Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous problem spaces and drive solutions with minimal direction.


Preferred Qualifications:


Exposure to building AI-powered platforms or products, including contributing to architectural decisions.
Foundational knowledge of core machine learning and data science principles, including supervised/unsupervised learning, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Familiarity with transformer architectures (BERT, GPT, etc.) and basic understanding of attention mechanisms, tokenization, and fine-tuning concepts.
Exposure to embeddings and vector representations, including text embeddings and similarity search concepts; interest in vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, or similar).
Familiarity with NLP techniques such as text classification, named entity recognition, or semantic search.
Familiarity with real-world agentic frameworks workflow engines (e.g., in-house automation platforms, langchain/graph, n8n, Make, or similar), with a solid understanding of how they work under the hood.
Experience developing AI-assisted or agentic systems that interact with tools, data, or workflows.
Familiarity with cloud-native development using AWS.
Experience with containerized systems and orchestration tools such as Docker and Kubernetes.
Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and modern development workflows (e.g., GitLab).
Experience with Golang is a plus (or willingness to learn).


About You:


You have relentlessly high standards - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.
You’re not bound by convention - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do things
You need action - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.
You earn trust - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.


What Makes Working at Sezzle Awesome:

At Sezzle, we are more than just brilliant engineers, passionate data enthusiasts, out-of-the-box thinkers, and determined innovators. We believe in surrounding ourselves with only the best and the brightest individuals. Our culture is not defined by a certain set of perks designed to give the illusion of the traditional startup culture, but rather, it is the visible example living in every employee that we hire.

title: Intern, Marketing, Mexico, 2026
skills: Apoyar el desarrollo y la ejecución de campañas de marketing alineadas con la estrategia de la marca.
Colaborar en la preparación de presentaciones, informes y materiales para reuniones internas y revisiones con la dirección.
Coordinar los cronogramas de los proyectos, dar seguimiento con agencias y equipos internos, y supervisar el cumplimiento de los entregables.
Apoyar las actividades digitales y de redes sociales mediante la recopilación y análisis de métricas, el monitoreo del desempeño y la propuesta de mejoras.
Brindar apoyo en la logística y planificación de eventos, reuniones y actividades educativas.
Proporcionar soporte administrativo general al equipo de marca y garantizar el cumplimiento de los procesos internos de la empresa.
Ser estudiante activo de Mercadotecnia, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o una carrera afín.
Contar con al menos un año restante para graduarse al inicio de las prácticas profesionales.
Dominio del español y nivel avanzado de inglés, tanto oral como escrito.
Manejo de Microsoft Office, especialmente PowerPoint y Word, así como conocimientos prácticos de Excel.
Disponibilidad para trabajar de 4 a 6 horas diarias, de lunes a viernes, y compromiso para realizar prácticas profesionales durante 12 meses.
Estar inscrito en una universidad en México durante toda la duración del programa de prácticas profesionales.
Experiencia previa en prácticas profesionales o trabajo en áreas de marketing, atención médica o ciencias de la vida.
Familiaridad con herramientas de analítica digital, como Google Analytics o plataformas de métricas para redes sociales.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de colaboración, como Teams, Zoom o Webex.
Conocimientos avanzados de Excel, incluyendo el uso de tablas de datos básicas y la creación de gráficos.
Facilidad para colaborar con agencias creativas y proveedores externos.
Interés en el marketing del sector salud y motivación por generar un impacto positivo.
Remuneración económica
Vales de comida
Equipo abierto y amigable
Aprendizaje constante
description:
About the job

Ayúdanos a adelantarnos a las enfermedades junto con nuestra Área de Marketing.

Formación requerida: Actualmente cursando carreras de Marketing, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o afines.

Mínimo 1 año para terminar.

Otros requisitos: Debe estar matriculado/a en una universidad de México durante la pasantía.

Requisitos de idioma: Inglés avanzado

Fecha de inicio prevista: Agosto 2026

Periodo de prácticas: 1 año

Modelo híbrido: 2 días onsite

Fecha límite de solicitud: Recomendamos postular lo antes posible. Cerraremos esta vacante cuando tengamos suficientes solicitudes, así que aplica cuanto antes para que tu candidatura pueda ser considerada.

¿Buscas adquirir una valiosa experiencia laboral a nivel mundial y ayudar a impactar positivamente en la salud de miles de millones de personas? ¡Solicita hoy una práctica en GSK!

Una práctica en GSK te ofrece la oportunidad de impulsar tu carrera: ¡asumirás un puesto real con un impacto genuino! Realizarás un trabajo exigente y significativo en proyectos o asignaciones reales. También aprenderás con nosotros, desarrollarás tus habilidades y adquirirás una experiencia valiosa para dondequiera que te lleve el futuro.

¿Qué harás? 


Apoyar el desarrollo y la ejecución de campañas de marketing alineadas con la estrategia de la marca.
Colaborar en la preparación de presentaciones, informes y materiales para reuniones internas y revisiones con la dirección.
Coordinar los cronogramas de los proyectos, dar seguimiento con agencias y equipos internos, y supervisar el cumplimiento de los entregables.
Apoyar las actividades digitales y de redes sociales mediante la recopilación y análisis de métricas, el monitoreo del desempeño y la propuesta de mejoras.
Brindar apoyo en la logística y planificación de eventos, reuniones y actividades educativas.
Proporcionar soporte administrativo general al equipo de marca y garantizar el cumplimiento de los procesos internos de la empresa.


¿Qué estamos buscando?


Ser estudiante activo de Mercadotecnia, Administración de Empresas, Comunicación o una carrera afín.
Contar con al menos un año restante para graduarse al inicio de las prácticas profesionales.
Dominio del español y nivel avanzado de inglés, tanto oral como escrito.
Manejo de Microsoft Office, especialmente PowerPoint y Word, así como conocimientos prácticos de Excel.
Disponibilidad para trabajar de 4 a 6 horas diarias, de lunes a viernes, y compromiso para realizar prácticas profesionales durante 12 meses.
Estar inscrito en una universidad en México durante toda la duración del programa de prácticas profesionales.


Deseables

Si cuentas con las siguientes características, será un valor agregado:


Experiencia previa en prácticas profesionales o trabajo en áreas de marketing, atención médica o ciencias de la vida.
Familiaridad con herramientas de analítica digital, como Google Analytics o plataformas de métricas para redes sociales.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de colaboración, como Teams, Zoom o Webex.
Conocimientos avanzados de Excel, incluyendo el uso de tablas de datos básicas y la creación de gráficos.
Facilidad para colaborar con agencias creativas y proveedores externos.
Interés en el marketing del sector salud y motivación por generar un impacto positivo.


¿Qué aprendrás?

Te incorporarás al equipo de Marketing en México como practicante, brindando apoyo en actividades de marketing relacionadas con vacunas. Colaborarás en la ejecución de campañas, el desarrollo de contenidos y la coordinación de proyectos. Trabajarás de cerca con gerentes de producto, agencias y equipos multidisciplinarios.

¿Qué te ofrecemos? 


Remuneración económica
Vales de comida
Equipo abierto y amigable
Aprendizaje constante


¡Hagámoslo realidad!

Encontrarás consejos, sugerencias y orientación sobre nuestro proceso de selección en nuestro sitio web.

Obtén más información sobre el proceso de solicitud en gsk.to/ECprocess (opcional).

Puedes aprender más sobre GSK y nuestras carreras aquí: https://www.gsk.com/en-gb/careers/

¡Postúlate ahora!

¿Necesitas ayuda con tu solicitud?

Por favor escríbenos a AM.EarlyTalentRecruitment@gsk.com y dinos cómo podemos ayudarte.

#EarlyCareers

Why GSK?

Uniting science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together.

GSK is a global biopharma company with a purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. We aim to positively impact the health of 2.5 billion people by the end of the decade, as a successful, growing company where people can thrive. We get ahead of disease by preventing and treating it with innovation in specialty medicines and vaccines. We focus on four therapeutic areas: respiratory, immunology and inflammation; oncology; HIV; and infectious diseases – to impact health at scale.

People and patients around the world count on the medicines and vaccines we make, so we’re committed to creating an environment where our people can thrive and focus on what matters most. Our culture of being ambitious for patients, accountable for impact and doing the right thing is the foundation for how, together, we deliver for patients, shareholders and our people.

If you require any type of accommodation and/or support during the selection process to better showcase your abilities (for example, access to ramps, accessible emergency exits, visual aids, etc.), please let us know when we contact you. We are here to support you.

Your application is voluntary; therefore, you understand and consent that GSK, located at Real Mayorazgo 130, Torre M, Piso 20, Col. Xoco, Benito Juárez, Mexico City, will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy in accordance with the candidate privacy notice, which can be consulted at Candidate Privacy Notice. Among the information you provide for this purpose, you may choose to give us personal data that will help ensure an inclusive selection process. Rest assured that your information will be treated with the utmost confidentiality, in compliance with applicable regulations, and will not be available to hiring managers or anyone outside the recruitment team. Help us maintain, together, an inclusive and welcoming environment. By submitting information, I confirm that I agree that it will be processed in accordance with the stated privacy notice.

Important notice to Employment businesses/ Agencies

GSK does not accept referrals from employment businesses and/or employment agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site. All employment businesses/agencies are required to contact GSK's commercial and general procurement/human resources department to obtain prior written authorization before referring any candidates to GSK. The obtaining of prior written authorization is a condition precedent to any agreement (verbal or written) between the employment business/ agency and GSK. In the absence of such written authorization being obtained any actions undertaken by the employment business/agency shall be deemed to have been performed without the consent or contractual agreement of GSK. GSK shall therefore not be liable for any fees arising from such actions or any fees arising from any referrals by employment businesses/agencies in respect of the vacancies posted on this site.

Find more about life at GSK at www.gsk.com

skills: A) Desarrollo de comunicación y campañas
Elaborar briefs para agencias creativas y de medios.

title: Paid Search Specialist
skills: Build, launch, and maintain Paid Search/Shopping campaigns aligned to client objectives, audience, and inventory realities; surface trade‑offs and clarifying questions early.
Prepare clear, on‑time performance updates and inputs for QBRs with actionable next steps.
Operate platform tooling (Google/Microsoft Ads, SA360/Skai), audience/keyword tools, and feed basics; apply automation responsibly (e.g., smart bidding, Performance Max) with guidance.
Pull and interpret Bliss Point signals (e.g., Forecasting, Always‑On Incrementality, Creative Insights) to inform day‑to‑day optimizations; log issues and feedback to product/analytics channels.
Monitor daily/weekly performance; build accurate recurring reports; run basic A/B tests with defined success criteria; maintain pacing and budgets.
Execute tagging and feed QA checklists; partner with Analytics to validate reads and resolve anomalies.
Demonstrate sound channel craft and growing cross‑channel awareness; connect measurement to growth; follow and help refine team playbooks and SOPs.
Manage a clear work queue; deliver on time; proactively flag risks/blockers; reduce rework and non‑converting spend; close the loop with documented learnings.
Greatness attracts Greatness: Seek feedback, hone craft, embrace technology and AI.
Clients grow, we grow: Lead with precision, innovation, and proof.
Culture of ownership: Act with speed, reduce waste, and own outcomes end‑to‑end.
Experience: 2–3 years executing and managing Paid Search/Shopping (builds, launches, pacing, optimizations); monthly budgets ~$50K+.
Platform fluency: Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, Merchant Center; SA360 or Skai; competitive tools (Auction Insights; familiarity with Adalysis/Adthena/SpyFu).
Analytics: GA/GA4 and advanced Excel/Sheets (pivots, lookups); able to create clear performance narratives and basic test readouts.
Communication and collaboration: Clear written/verbal status updates; cross‑functional teamwork in a Pod; receptive to coaching and able to “manage up.”
Certifications: Google Search & Shopping (or completed in the first 60 days). Additional Google certifications are a strong advantage.
Delivery excellence: On‑time, accurate launches and reporting; clean QA (low defect rate).
Efficient growth support: Day‑to‑day optimizations that support efficiency KPIs while contributing to revenue goals.
Waste reduction: Decrease non‑converting queries; improve feed/tagging fidelity.
Product/AI usage: Adopt relevant automation and Bliss Point insights with documented impact.
Experimentation: Execute prioritized tests with clear success criteria and learnings.
Collaboration & communication: Clear handoffs, risk flags, and QBR inputs that inform decisions.
description:
About the job

Who We Are

Tinuiti is the largest independent full-funnel marketing agency in the U.S. across the media that matters most, with $4 billion in digital media under management and more than 1,200 employees. Built for marketers who demand growth and accountability, Tinuiti unites media and measurement under one roof to eliminate waste—the biggest growth killer of all—and scale what works. Its proprietary technology, Bliss Point by Tinuiti, reveals the truth around growth and waste, and how to capitalize on it. With expert teams across Commerce, Search, Social, TV & Audio, and more, Tinuiti delivers measurable results with brutal simplicity: Love Growth. Hate Waste.

We’d Love To Hear From You If

Research shows that while men apply to jobs when they meet an average of 60% of the criteria, women and other marginalized folks tend to only apply when they check every box. So if you think you qualify, but don't necessarily meet every single point on the job description, please still get in touch.

As a Paid Search Specialist, you will execute and optimize Paid Search and Shopping campaigns to drive efficient client growth. You’ll build high‑quality account structures, translate performance data into clear next actions, and apply automation and Bliss Point insights under guidance to reduce waste and improve outcomes. You’ll set and deliver Rocks with directional KPIs, partner across your Pod (Channel SMEs, Analytics, Creative, Client Leads, Product/Bliss Point), and continuously document and improve your workflows. We align scope and expectations to our job architecture for consistency and transparent progression.

Key Responsibilities

Client‑Centric


Build, launch, and maintain Paid Search/Shopping campaigns aligned to client objectives, audience, and inventory realities; surface trade‑offs and clarifying questions early.
Prepare clear, on‑time performance updates and inputs for QBRs with actionable next steps.


Product‑Led


Operate platform tooling (Google/Microsoft Ads, SA360/Skai), audience/keyword tools, and feed basics; apply automation responsibly (e.g., smart bidding, Performance Max) with guidance.
Pull and interpret Bliss Point signals (e.g., Forecasting, Always‑On Incrementality, Creative Insights) to inform day‑to‑day optimizations; log issues and feedback to product/analytics channels.


Data & Measurement‑Driven


Monitor daily/weekly performance; build accurate recurring reports; run basic A/B tests with defined success criteria; maintain pacing and budgets.
Execute tagging and feed QA checklists; partner with Analytics to validate reads and resolve anomalies.


The Tinuiti Way


Demonstrate sound channel craft and growing cross‑channel awareness; connect measurement to growth; follow and help refine team playbooks and SOPs.


Owner Mindset


Manage a clear work queue; deliver on time; proactively flag risks/blockers; reduce rework and non‑converting spend; close the loop with documented learnings.


Ways of working and values


Greatness attracts Greatness: Seek feedback, hone craft, embrace technology and AI.
Clients grow, we grow: Lead with precision, innovation, and proof.
Culture of ownership: Act with speed, reduce waste, and own outcomes end‑to‑end.


Professional & Technical Qualifications


Experience: 2–3 years executing and managing Paid Search/Shopping (builds, launches, pacing, optimizations); monthly budgets ~$50K+.
Platform fluency: Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, Merchant Center; SA360 or Skai; competitive tools (Auction Insights; familiarity with Adalysis/Adthena/SpyFu).
Analytics: GA/GA4 and advanced Excel/Sheets (pivots, lookups); able to create clear performance narratives and basic test readouts.
Communication and collaboration: Clear written/verbal status updates; cross‑functional teamwork in a Pod; receptive to coaching and able to “manage up.”
Certifications: Google Search & Shopping (or completed in the first 60 days). Additional Google certifications are a strong advantage.


KPIs


Delivery excellence: On‑time, accurate launches and reporting; clean QA (low defect rate).
Efficient growth support: Day‑to‑day optimizations that support efficiency KPIs while contributing to revenue goals.
Waste reduction: Decrease non‑converting queries; improve feed/tagging fidelity.
Product/AI usage: Adopt relevant automation and Bliss Point insights with documented impact.
Experimentation: Execute prioritized tests with clear success criteria and learnings.
Collaboration & communication: Clear handoffs, risk flags, and QBR inputs that inform decisions.


We operate on a flexible hybrid model, but we love seeing our team! For this role, we ask that you come into our great office in Reforma, CDMX, two days a week. This is an essential part of how we collaborate and connect, so candidates should be comfortable with this regular in-office commitment.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Benefits

Unlimited PTO: At Tinuiti, we believe you deserve time to rest, recharge, and enjoy life unplugged. When you prioritize time for yourself, you're able to bring your best self to work. That’s why we offer unlimited paid time off, a hybrid work environment, and flexibility to take the time you need, when you need it. On top of that, we provide 16 paid holidays, including multiple long weekends, to ensure you have dedicated time to step away and disconnect. We're proud to offer above-industry standard work-life balance, consistently rated as one of the most loved benefits by Tinuitians year after year.

Healthcare: Major Medical (including dental and vision coverage), Minor Medical, Life Insurance Retirement: We offer a Savings Fund which includes a 10% employer match (10% employee contribution required for participation)

Perks and Wellness: Thankful giving, Equity

Parental Leave: Birthing parents receive 16 weeks of leave with 100% pay, consisting of 12 weeks statutory leave and 4 additional paid weeks through company policy. Non-birthing parents will receive 6 weeks of leave with 100% pay.

Learning and Development: On-demand learning (powered by LinkedIn Learning), mentorship program, leadership and management development programs and resources

Disclaimer: This description has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this position. The actual duties, responsibilities, and qualifications may vary based on assignment or group. Tinuiti is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, religion, national origin, marital status, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other protected status.

About the job

Nuestro cliente crea y opera marcas virtuales de restaurantes, combinando lo mejor del mundo gastronómico con tecnología y analítica avanzada. Si te apasionan los entornos dinámicos, los retos de crecimiento y ser parte de una compañía en expansión, este es tu lugar.




¿Qué harás en esta posición?

Serás responsable de liderar la gestión de proyectos de nuevas marcas y mantener las marcas actuales vivas y relevantes en el mercado. Coordinarás lanzamientos, campañas especiales y ajustes de producto, siendo el punto central entre áreas como Calidad, Operaciones y Diseño. Experiencia previa liderando lanzamientos, campañas o desarrollo de productos.

description:
About the job

Company Introduction

WorldStrides is the global leader in educational travel and experiential learning. The company was founded in 1967 to provide middle school travel programs to Washington, D.C. and has grown to provide a wide range of programs for more than half a million students annually to over 100 countries around the world. WorldStrides offers experiential learning programs in educational travel, performing arts, language immersion, career exploration, service-learning, study abroad, and sports. Each of these experiences helps students to see beyond the classroom and to see the world – and themselves – in new ways.

Job Description

The Business Development Representative (BDR) / Lead Qualifier is responsible for generating new business opportunities through high-volume outbound calls and email outreach to schools and teachers across the U.S.

In this role, you will: Proactively prospect and engage educators to introduce WorldStrides programs, qualify leads by identifying teachers interested in organizing student travel experiences, consistently meet and exceed monthly targets for calls and qualified leads, and collaborate with the Sales team by passing high-quality opportunities for closing.

This is a goal-driven, outbound sales role where success depends on your ability to handle rejection and stay motivated, build rapport quickly over the phone, maintain strong activity levels daily, and meet weekly and monthly goals in order to achieve additional compensation through a set commission structure.

You’ll work with a wide range of educational travel programs (history, science, national parks, and more), giving you constant opportunities to connect with new prospects and refine your sales and communication skills.

Responsibilities


Make calls and leave messages for teachers nationwide and use talk tracks for live calls.
Send follow-up emails.
Work on special projects, including periodic competitive calls, calls to unassigned schools, specialty schools and other telemarketing efforts.
Periodically research schools to help identify top prospects and maintain the database. Use templates to create and send flyers and update PowerPoint presentations.


Qualifications


Desired work experience in sales, marketing, promotions or telemarketing.
Proficiency in relevant computer applications including CRM.
Desired knowledge of customer service/sales principles and practices.
Six months or more experience in sales/lead creation/lead qualifying with Telephone sales experience preferred
Good data entry/keyboard skills
Familiar with office rules/office environment
High school diploma or GED required
Advanced (85%+) English level
Desired knowledge of sales and marketing principles and strategies
Proactive
Organized


Work Perks


Fun & driven environment.
Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage, life, accidental death and dismemberment, accident, critical illness, and disability insurance.
+10% of gross salary as food stamps.
1 paid volunteer day & 25 PTO* days to start – accrue up to 28 over 3 years, 4 mental health days, and 5 bereavement days.
Statutory Holidays by Mexican Federal Labor Law.
Tuition reimbursement up to five thousand, two hundred fifty dollars annually or one thousand dollars towards professional certification annually.
Flexible work schedule providing on-site and hybrid opportunities.
Encouraged participation in our Employee Resource Groups and Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion council.
Fitness opportunities. Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
Paid statutory parental leave.


WorldStrides, a global organization, is committed to educate and serve communities worldwide. Our commitment is fueled by the passion of our team members and partners to make experiential learning accessible, while also being socially, environmentally, and ethically responsible. Together, we accomplish this by investing in initiatives to promote inclusion, diversity, and sustainability.

As an Equal Opportunity Employer, WorldStrides is committed to building a diverse workforce, supported by an environment that promotes inclusion and belonging. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.

WorldStrides will only employ those who are legally authorized to work in the United States. This is not a position for which sponsorship will be provided. Individuals with temporary visas such as E, F-1, J-1, H-1, H-2, L, B, J or TN, or who need sponsorship for work authorization now or in the future, are not eligible for hire. Select seasonal roles may consider students on J-1 or F-1 visas.

description:
About the job

Introduction

Job Title: Social Media & Marketing Specialist
Work Hours: Part-time (20 hours/week)
Schedule/Timezone: Flexible overlap with U.S. hours
Location: 100% Remote




Overview

Ready to channel your passion for action sports into building a bold, unapologetic brand? We are a rapidly growing lifestyle apparel brand deeply rooted in the dirt bike, motocross, and off-road racing community. Known for our unconventional personality, bold designs, and authentic connection to riders who embrace freedom and adventure, we have built a fiercely loyal following of enthusiasts who value self-expression.

As we continue to expand, we are looking for a creative, self-driven Social Media & Marketing Specialist to help supercharge our online presence, spark community engagement, and drive sales growth through killer content and sharp digital marketing initiatives. This role is the perfect playground for someone who truly understands motorsports culture and wants to play a key role in scaling a highly recognizable lifestyle brand.




Key Responsibilities

Create, edit, and publish engaging content across Instagram, TikTok, and other social media platforms.
Develop graphics, images, and marketing assets that perfectly align with the brand's unique identity and voice.
Manage social media calendars and posting schedules to maintain consistent audience engagement.
Support brand growth through creative campaigns, organic audience engagement, and content strategy.
Manage and maintain the Instagram Shop, assisting with product uploads and visual merchandising.
Monitor social media performance analytics to identify opportunities to improve reach and engagement.
Engage directly with followers, customers, and community members to strengthen brand loyalty.
Stay current on social media trends, motorsports content, and emerging marketing opportunities.
Attend select racing events and trade shows to represent the brand and support live marketing activations.
Collaborate directly with the founder on creative ideas, campaigns, and overall brand-building efforts.




Must-Have Requirements

2+ years of experience in social media marketing, content creation, or digital marketing.
Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and social media best practices.
Experience creating visual content using Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar design tools.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Ability to work independently, take complete ownership of projects, and show strong attention to detail.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment.
A professional remote work setup with a reliable internet connection.
Comfortable representing a bold, unconventional lifestyle brand.




Nice-to-Have Requirements

Familiarity with dirt bike, motocross, off-road, racing, or action sports culture.
Experience managing e-commerce platforms and social commerce tools.
Photography, videography, or video editing experience.
Experience attending events, trade shows, or brand activations.
Proven track record of growing social media audiences and engagement organically.
Bilingual capabilities (English and Spanish).

title: Regional Campaign Lead, LATAM
description:
About the job

What To Expect
Tesla is seeking an experienced and strategic Regional Campaign Lead to join our Latinamerica Sales and Delivery Organization, supporting the Field Sales team. In this high-impact role, you will lead regional development, execution, and optimization of strategic outbound programs and campaigns designed to increase brand awareness and increase market penetration. This includes responsibilitiesrelated to but not limited to scaling Events, Self-Serve, and Media opportunities.

As a Regional Campaign Lead, you will have a rare opportunity to scale several high impact top of funnel programs. This key role will drive cross-functional alignment, manage complex initiatives, and build robust strategies to grow regional market share. Understanding and evaluating performance and KPI’s is critical to the success of the program. You will partner closely with internal stakeholders to ensure program success from start to finish.

What You'll Do


Lead end-to-end strategy planning, coordination, and delivery of high-impact events, media opportunities, and self-serve expansion across a region, ensuring alignment with leadership, company goals, and stakeholder expectations
Exercise independent judgement to resolve logistical or operational challenges that may arise during event planning and event execution ensuring the proposed solution has Tesla’s best interest in mind
Manage relationships with business partners, vendors, local media and cross-functional teams to enhance event logistics, resources, and community engagement while driving regional growth
Take ownership in negotiating with external stakeholders to bring opportunities to leadership that significantly propel Tesla in achieving our mission
Monitor event KPIs, conduct post-event reviews, and implement data-driven insights to refine processes and scale successful regional strategies to drive market growth
Become a leader in top-of-funnel initiatives in your region, providing strategy suggestions and insights to leadership to shape the regional growth curve
Manage regional budgets and optimize resource allocation to support regional growth objectives



What You'll Bring


Bachelor’s Degree in Communications, Marketing, Project Management, or equivalent experience with 4+ years in a similar demand generation, marketing or strategic program management roles
Expertise in strategic planning, execution, and optimization of demand generation programs, with experience collaborating and advising senior leadership for decision-making reports and presentations. This role requires independent judgement and strategic decision-making
Experienced in negotiating partnerships and contracts with third-party vendors to drive growth with little oversight. With proficiency in budget management and resource allocation for scalable Top of funnel market growth programs
Strong ability to manage multiple projects with attention to detail and deadlines, while adapting to changing priorities in a fast-paced ambiguous environment
Strong leadership, communication, and relationship management skills – with the ability to build relationships quickly both internally and externally – with the ability to represent Tesla to external partners. Advanced analytical skills to evaluate opportunities both past and future using data, trends and tools to calculate effectiveness of opportunities
Valid driver’s license and flexibility to work evenings, weekends, and holidays as required. Passion for Tesla’s mission and a deep understanding of the customer journey and sales cycle
75% of the time dedicated to strategic planning, stakeholder management, and budget optimization. Travel may be required up to 50% of the time to execute high-impact regional strategies and build stakeholder relationships



, Tesla

Trabajar de forma cercana con equipos de creatividad, producto y marca en el desarrollo, prueba y escalamiento de activos creativos de alto rendimiento.

Experiencia en negocios digitales basados en suscripción, apps o plataformas de streaming

description:
About the job

TelevisaUnivision es la compañía de medios en español líder en el mundo, con presencia en plataformas digitales, streaming, redes sociales, audio, televisión lineal y eventos en vivo. Continuamos invirtiendo en nuestro contenido, tecnología y talento, impulsando el crecimiento de nuestra plataforma de streaming ViX.

Buscamos un Coordinador Growth Marketing responsable de liderar iniciativas de marketing de rendimiento basadas en datos que impulsen la adquisición de suscriptores y el crecimiento de las plataformas de streaming de TelevisaUnivision.

Esta posición supervisará la estrategia de inversión en medios pagados, la optimización de campañas y el análisis de desempeño para maximizar el crecimiento de suscriptores y el impacto en resultados de negocio. El rol trabajará de forma cercana con equipos de analítica, marketing, creatividad, producto y marca para asegurar que las campañas estén estratégicamente financiadas, ejecutadas con eficiencia y optimizadas continuamente con base en insights de datos.

About You

Eres un profesional de marketing de rendimiento orientado a datos, con sólidas habilidades analíticas y un profundo entendimiento del ecosistema de medios digitales pagados. Cuentas con experiencia gestionando presupuestos de medios complejos y optimizando estrategias de inversión para maximizar resultados. Utilizas datos, modelos de atribución y análisis de desempeño para guiar decisiones estratégicas de marketing y te desenvuelves con éxito en entornos dinámicos y orientados a resultados.

Trabajas de manera colaborativa con equipos multifuncionales para ejecutar iniciativas de alto impacto y comprendes cómo el marketing de performance contribuye a la adquisición de usuarios y al crecimiento de negocios basados en suscripción dentro del ecosistema de streaming.

Your Day-day


Gestionar el presupuesto de medios pagados para asegurar una asignación eficiente de recursos y maximizar la adquisición y retención de suscriptores.
Analizar modelos de Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), atribución y datos de desempeño para informar decisiones de inversión y planificar estrategias de crecimiento.
Coordinar lanzamientos y proyectos prioritarios para asegurar que las iniciativas de marketing estén estratégicamente financiadas y optimizadas para el desempeño.
Monitorear el desempeño de campañas y realizar ajustes en tiempo real para optimizar la inversión en medios pagados.
Colaborar con los equipos de Marketing Analytics y Business Intelligence para evaluar resultados de atribución y generar recomendaciones basadas en datos.
Evaluar el desempeño de estrategias creativas en canales de performance, identificando oportunidades de optimización en mensajes y formatos.
Trabajar de forma cercana con equipos de creatividad, producto y marca en el desarrollo, prueba y escalamiento de activos creativos de alto rendimiento.


You Have


Licenciatura en Negocios, Marketing o campo relacionado
Mas de 5 años de experiencia en marketing de performance, medios pagados o adquisición digital
Experiencia en negocios digitales basados en suscripción, apps o plataformas de streaming
Conocimiento sólido de KPIs de marketing digital y plataformas de atribución (AppsFlyer, Kochava)
Fuertes habilidades analíticas, planeación estratégica y gestión de presupuestos de medios
Dominio avanzado de Excel y PowerPoint, con capacidad para comunicar insights a nivel ejecutivo
Dominio profesional de inglés y español
Experiencia en streaming, medios digitales o plataformas de suscripción
Familiaridad con Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)
Experiencia trabajando con equipos multifuncionales (analytics, creativo, producto, marca)


Eligibility Requirements


Disponibilidad para trabajar de manera presencial en la oficina de Santa Fe, Ciudad de México.
El empleo y la formación académica estarán sujetos a verificación.
Debe estar autorizado(a) para trabajar a tiempo completo en México.


Our Benefits

En TelevisaUnivision creemos que los colaboradores felices y con un buen equilibrio entre su vida personal y profesional son la base de una cultura organizacional sólida. Ofrecemos una amplia gama de beneficios y prestaciones.

Univision es un empleador que ofrece equidad e igualdad de oportunidades. Todos los solicitantes calificados recibirán consideración para el empleo sin distinción de sexo, identidad de género, orientación sexual, raza, color, religión, origen nacional, discapacidad, estado de veterano protegido, edad o cualquier otra característica protegida por la ley.

title: Retail Media Specialist (Amazon Ads/Walmart Ads/Instacart)
skills: Lead performance-driven campaigns across retail media platforms and drive measurable growth.

Stay ahead of trends, experimenting with new platforms and products to gain a competitive edge.
Plan and execute campaigns on Amazon, Instacart, Walmart, Kroger, and other retail channels.
Oversee content calendar, creative QA, and campaign implementation.
Analyze data using tools like Google Analytics and Amazon Analytics to optimize performance.
Collaborate with creative, content, operations, and analytics teams for integrated delivery.
Generate compelling client reports and presentations with a storytelling approach.
3+ years of experience in performance media strategy within an agency or in-house team.
3+ years working on eCommerce or shopper marketing initiatives.
Strong expertise in Sponsored Search and retail media platforms (Amazon, Instacart, Walmart, etc.).
Experience with Skai, PacVue, or Criteo is a plus.
Proven ability to hit ROI/ROAS goals and manage performance metrics.
Confident in client presentations and relationship building.
Solid grasp of retail success drivers: paid media, organic content, ops, and promotions.
Comfortable with analytics platforms and making data-driven decisions.
Excellent organization, communication, and project management skills.
description:
About the job

We're on the lookout for a talented Retail Media Specialist (Amazon Ads/Walmart Ads/Instacart) to join our client's team:




🌎 100% Remote

💵 Salary in USD

📍 LATAM – Collaborating with teams in the USA (PST)

🕒 Full Time

📝 Contractor Role




About our client

You’ll be joining a cutting-edge digital agency that partners with top eCommerce brands to deliver performance-focused media strategies. Known for blending innovation and analytics, the team is constantly testing and optimizing to unlock scalable growth.




Responsibilities

Lead performance-driven campaigns across retail media platforms and drive measurable growth.
Build strong client relationships, offering strategic insights and actionable recommendations.
Focus on KPIs like ROAS, ROI, SOV, and revenue growth.
Mentor a high-performing eCommerce media team.
Stay ahead of trends, experimenting with new platforms and products to gain a competitive edge.
Plan and execute campaigns on Amazon, Instacart, Walmart, Kroger, and other retail channels.
Oversee content calendar, creative QA, and campaign implementation.
Analyze data using tools like Google Analytics and Amazon Analytics to optimize performance.
Collaborate with creative, content, operations, and analytics teams for integrated delivery.
Generate compelling client reports and presentations with a storytelling approach.




Requirements and Skills

3+ years of experience in performance media strategy within an agency or in-house team.
3+ years working on eCommerce or shopper marketing initiatives.
Strong expertise in Sponsored Search and retail media platforms (Amazon, Instacart, Walmart, etc.).
Experience with Skai, PacVue, or Criteo is a plus.
Proven ability to hit ROI/ROAS goals and manage performance metrics.
Confident in client presentations and relationship building.
Solid grasp of retail success drivers: paid media, organic content, ops, and promotions.
Comfortable with analytics platforms and making data-driven decisions.
Excellent organization, communication, and project management skills.




About Latamforce

Latamforce is a leading nearshoring staffing agency that helps businesses in the U.S. find top-tier talent from Latin America. We specialize in connecting companies with skilled professionals in Latin America.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Web Developer (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices
Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality
Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities
Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines
Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses
Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements




Qualifications

Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome
Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust
Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline




Eligibility Requirements

Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations:
Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela




Compensation

Earn up to $34 USD/hr — core project rate with additional performance incentives averaging 7.5% on top
Payments issued weekly via supported payout platforms (e.g., PayPal or AirTM)




Work Arrangement

Fully remote and asynchronous
Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.




Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
About the job

Remote Automotive Sales Development Representative




Please watch this 2-minute video first:

https://www.loom.com/share/699b59fd8ebc427583977b751453994b




Auto City | California-Based Automotive Dealership

https://www.goautocity.com/about-us

Compensation: $8 USD per hour, based on a full-time schedule of 40 hours per week. This equals approximately $1,385 USD per month, with the opportunity to earn up to an additional $500 USD per month in performance-based commissions.




Contract Type: Independent contractor (you will be responsible for your own taxes and benefits).




Equipment: You need to provide your own computer equipment and internet.

Auto City is a used-car dealership based in El Cajon, California, focused on making the car-buying process simple, transparent, and no-pressure. The dealership emphasizes up-front pricing, vehicle-history transparency, quality inventory, helpful financing options, and a relaxed customer experience where shoppers can move at their own pace.

About the Role

We are looking for a remote Remote Automotive Sales Development Representative to support a San Diego-based automotive dealership. This person will make outbound calls, follow up with leads, schedule appointments, and help convert interested customers into dealership visits.

Working Hours

9:00 AM–5:00 PM U.S. Pacific Time.

CDMX / Costa Rica: 10:00 AM–6:00 PM | Colombia: 11:00 AM–7:00 PM | Argentina / Brazil: 1:00 PM–9:00 PM

Key Responsibilities

• Make outbound calls to internet leads, past customers, and follow-up prospects.

• Respond to customers by phone, text, and email.

• Schedule and confirm appointments for test drives or sales consultations.

• Update CRM notes and track follow-up activity accurately.

• Transfer qualified leads to the appropriate salesperson or manager.

• Provide a professional and friendly customer experience.

Requirements

• Advanced English and strong phone communication skills.

• Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, customer service, sales support, or call center work.

• Comfortable making a high volume of calls.

• Organized, reliable, and detail-oriented.

• Reliable internet connection and quiet remote workspace.

Nice to Have

• Automotive dealership or BDC experience.

• Experience with dealership CRMs such as VinSolutions, DealerSocket, Elead, or similar.

Application Process

Interview with Latin Remote Workers

Short Practical take-home exercise

Final interview with the hiring manager

description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Our product portfolio, which includes 22 of the world's most iconic brands, such as Sabritas, Gamesa, Quaker, Pepsi, Gatorade and Sonrics, has been a part of Mexican homes for more than 116 years.

A career at PepsiCo means working in a culture where all people are welcome. Here, you can dare to be you. No matter who you are, where you're from, or who you love, you can always influence the people around you and make a positive impact in the world.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

The Accounts Payable Analyst processes PO requests, processes invoices for payment, sets up new suppliers, assists with uniform ordering process, and provides Perm Merch Ordering/Tracking support for Division GTM organization for PBNA.

Your Impact

As R2P Analyst your functions would consist of …


Support of Requisition to Pay and Invoice Processing tasks including, but not limited to: (Making Decisions, Executing Actions)
Timely and Accurate PO Request Submission via Supplier Portal
Timely and Accurate Invoice Processing for Payment via MyBuy
Research, Troubleshoot, and Resubmit any Invoice Issues
Analyze any trends with invoice processing to identify root causes, and areas of improvement
Manage Supplier Set-up Process, ensuring all critical inputs are gathered from field teams and suppliers, and processed (Executing Actions, Providing Consultation)
Manage Perm Merch Process, working with Division Perm Merch Lead and Field Sales Reps to ensure all deadlines and deliverables are met (Executing Actions, Providing Consultation)
Assist with Uniform Ordering Process, following PO Request and Invoice Processing steps along with coordination with local hiring team (Executing Actions)
Provide Field Location Leaders with ad-hoc support as needed, and periodic updates on process improvement opportunities (Providing Consultation,


Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?


Fluent in English
Bachelor’s degree in Business/Control/Operations
Ability to work within strict deadlines, learn new processes quickly, work effectively with a team and adapt to constantly evolving work responsibilities
Must have strong analytical and problem-solving skills to formulate effective action plans to deal with issues proactively
Fluent with data, and proven ability to utilize Excel to extract necessary data when needed
Exceptional organizational skills to handle the high volume of requests
Ability to effectively communicate in a professional and constructive manner internally and with customers
Advanced/Proficient Computer Skills (Outlook, Word, Power Point, Excel)
Strong passion for customer service 
Ability to effectively interact and build a favorable business relationship with internal and external customers
Strong team player and committed to teamwork in all situations
Excellent written and oral communications skills
Demonstrated ability to leveraging system and tools
Meticulous attention to detail


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs.
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning.
Development programs according to Leadership skills.
Specialized training according to the role.
Learning experiences with internal and external providers.
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others.
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life.
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle.
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others.


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

description:
About the job

Sobre el Puesto 

Estamos buscando a una persona altamente motivada y orientada a resultados para unirse a nuestro equipo de Fleet Support Team. Este rol crítico combina la adquisición estratégica con la gestión dedicada de cuentas para impulsar el crecimiento de flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis. Serás una pieza fundamental para expandir nuestro negocio de vehículos en México, construyendo relaciones a largo plazo y de alto impacto con nuestros socios más estratégicos, asegurando su exitosa adquisición, incorporación y crecimiento sostenido en la plataforma. Este rol aprovechará un enfoque hiperlocal y presencial, operando desde una estructura de Greenlight y alineándose estrechamente con nuestro equipo de operaciones.

 Lo que harás 


 Identificar y adquirir flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis a través de diversos métodos como eventos, reclutamiento de campo, inteligencia de mercado y segmentación de prospectos. 
 Mantener una comunicación frecuente a través de diferentes canales con las Cuentas (Flotas) asignadas. 
 Resolver las solicitudes y escalamientos de los socios de flota de manera oportuna y dar seguimiento a las recomendaciones implementadas. 
 Analizar y rastrear las tendencias y problemas de rendimiento de las flotas, contactándolas proactivamente para ofrecer soluciones que impulsen su eficiencia. 
 Ser un experto en tu zona y la persona de referencia en tu área de especialidad (Gestión y Soporte de Flotas), compartiendo aprendizajes e información, y ofreciendo recomendaciones. 
 Apoyar en los procesos con el fin de optimizar la adquisición y el compromiso (engagement) de nuestros socios. 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 
 Colaborar con diferentes equipos y partes interesadas clave en Uber (Operaciones, Soporte al Cliente, etc.). 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 


 Lo que necesitarás 


 Experiencia en roles de atención directa al cliente. 
 Idioma inglés: Básico; Idioma español: Fluido. 
 Fuertes habilidades de comunicación con capacidad para adaptar el enfoque según se trate de partes interesadas internas o externas. 
 Sólidas habilidades analíticas y atención al detalle; capacidad para ver tanto "el panorama general" como los detalles minuciosos. 
 Visión de negocio: Comprender las interrelaciones de las métricas operativas clave, así como el impacto que las decisiones empresariales tienen sobre estas. 
 Ser organizado, decidido y poseer capacidad de pensamiento crítico. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps). 


 Calificaciones Preferidas 


 Experiencia previa en Ventas, B2B o Key Account Management. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps). 


~~ ~~

description:
About the job

Description

Amazon Ads helps brands create experiences that delight customers and deliver meaningful results. With 300+ million worldwide active customer accounts, and first-party insights based on shopping, streaming and browsing signals, brands can craft relevant campaigns that enhance customer experiences. Our solutions on Amazon.com, services like Twitch, IMDb T V, Alexa, Amazon Music, and partnerships with third-party publishers and exchanges make Amazon Ads the ultimate amplifier for brands to reach the right audiences in the right places, both on and off Amazon.

We’re looking for a results-oriented Account Manager who is passionate about partnering with our advertisers to make effective, analytically driven marketing decisions. As an Account Manager, you will manage and deliver against difficult advertiser goals and problems to drive revenue and exceed revenue targets. You nurture customer relationships, identify/close revenue driving actions and develop your client’s portfolio. Additionally, you will be able to leverage Amazon’s proprietary data to provide strategic and personalized campaign recommendations to meet your customer’s business goals. This role is highly collaborative, working with Creative, Sales, Product and Retail partners. The Account Manager’s strategic digital expertise is considered critical to unlocking greater value and impact for our advertisers.

Key Responsibilities


 Use knowledge of Amazon Advertising full-funnel ad products and measurement to craft tailored proposals for customers.
 Hit or exceed revenue targets for assigned book of business.
 Achieve assigned non-revenue business objectives and goals.
 Own all facets of the account management process for medium to large accounts, and develop strategic relationships with key points of contact.
 In partnership with the account team, develop annual brand and media strategies that map to customer objectives.
 Use first-party and third-party insights to build pre-flight, in-flight, and post-flight campaign-level recommendations that lead to revenue outcomes or increased customer satisfaction.
 Advocate for customers internally, and utilize internal resources, to drive customer success.
 Educate advertisers on performance metrics, category trends/approaches, and consumer insights using existing and/or customized insights.


Basic Qualifications


 Bachelor's degree in Economics, Marketing, Advertising, Statistics, Engineering, or Business
 Experience in digital advertising and client facing roles
 Experience analyzing data and best practices to assess performance drivers
 Experience with annual brand and media planning
 Experience with Excel


Preferred Qualifications


 Master of Business Administration
 Experience in display advertisement industry
 Experience in omni-channel marketing, search engine marketing or search engine optimization
 Experience in programmatic strategy and implementation


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.
