description:
About the job

Role: AI Data Collector (Remote)

Location: Work from anywhere

Job Type: Part-Time / Flexible

Daily Commitment: Flexible

No language barriers — this project records tasks only; no audio or speech required.

No experience required.




About the Role

Rilith AI is partnering with contributors — students, working professionals (office/field), and homemakers — to work on a research project in which participants record short egocentric (first-person POV) videos of everyday household tasks and daily activities performed at their work locations. You will record your hands carrying out real-life activities — at home or at work — with no extra time required beyond your normal routine. Everybody can participate.




Pay Rate

USD 10 per hour — United States
USD 6.5 per hour — Canada, Mexico, Brazil, Colombia, Argentina




Each participant can record up to 100 hours per environment (e.g. home, warehouse).




Eligibility Requirements

You must:

Reside in the United States, Canada, Mexico, Brazil, Colombia, or Argentina.
Own a compatible device:
Apple iPhone — iPhone 11 through 17 (all variants: Mini / Plus / Pro / Pro Max) (Not accepted: iPhone 16e, iPhone 17e)
Google Pixel — Pixel 6 through 10 (standard & Pro)
Samsung Galaxy — Galaxy S21 through S26 (standard / + / Ultra)




What You Will Do

Record first-person (egocentric) videos while performing real-life activities, including:

Household tasks (cooking, cleaning, laundry, and more)
Warehouse operations
Logistics activities
Retail and commercial operations

Check the app for the full list of available tasks.




Bonus & Payment Terms

Pay rate: USD 10/hr (US) / USD 6/hr (LATAM)
Payment method: PayPal
Flexible payment options - hourly, daily, weekly - as per the participants




Why Join?

Contribute to the development of next-generation AI and robotics systems
Get paid for every hour of video recorded in accordance with project guidelines
Start earning from day one
Record during your normal daily routine — no extra time needed
24/7 expert support available
Students and working professionals may request a certificate of contribution upon completion

Your data will remain secure. No personal information will be shared or disclosed without your consent.




About Rilith:

Rilith is empowering intelligent machines at scale. With teams spanning the USA, LATAM, EU, and Asia, we bring a truly global perspective to every project we undertake. Our on-the-ground experience extends beyond software and data — our team has hands-on experience working directly alongside robotic hardware, giving us a deeper understanding of real-world deployment needs. At Rilith, we take data responsibility seriously; all footage we collect is PII-free, with no face capture, ensuring every deliverable is fully privacy-safe. We don't just collect data — we collect it the right way.




We are highly agile and adaptive to challenging data projects.




Specializations:

Egocentric Head-Mounted Video – First-person POV captures using head-mounted rigs across residential and commercial settings. We handle participant recruitment, field deployments, and high-quality footage delivery.

Egocentric Human Hand Video – Hand-object interaction recordings in manufacturing, household, and daily-use settings using a multi-view rig (head, left-wrist, and right-wrist cameras).

Robotics Manipulation – Video capture of robotic gripper (2–3 finger) and dexterous hand (4–5 finger) tasks using a multi-view rig (head/overhead, left/right gripper, and front/top views).




Join our global network of Rilith Warriors:

Rilith has expertise in creating data specifically for Physical AI, which it does in collaboration with a globally spread freelancer network — we call them Rilith Warriors. What differentiates us from others is that we respect, care for, and understand the challenges faced by freelancers.

We ensure:

Timely payment
Continuous projects

title: Strategy & Planning Manager
skills: Building tools and reports to track and give visibility on strategic initiatives
Running data analysis to support decision making and project prioritization
Analyzing and applying optimization initiatives
Leading, managing and tracking key business projects
Develop in-depth country-level market analysis, incl. regulation change and forecast, competitive landscape, customer/product insight, etc.
Lead the development and implementation of strategic initiatives.
Influence key stakeholders across product, operational, functional teams and headquarters to drive towards an aligned winning strategy.
Team player - our success depends on high collaboration
Show proactivity and entrepreneurial attitude: we’re flexible and we move fast, so don’t expect anyone to micromanage you. Just roll up your sleeves and get things done your way
Be organized and pragmatic: you will be dealing with high expectations and a large volume of activities that need to progress in sync, so simplification and prioritization will be keys to success.
Problem solving: break down big problems into small structured problems
Analytics: run analysis to build clear diagnostics
Business acumen: convert analytical diagnostics into practical conclusions and recommendations
Communication: spread the word about conclusions and recommendations, clearly and constructively
Stakeholder management: build strong relationships, understand other’s point of view, lead by influence and handle conflicting interests
Advanced skills with spreadsheets and analytics in general

Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Economics or similar fields
3-5 years of experience in management consulting, investment banking, tech companies, business administration, or roles related to strategy and planning.
Potential location base (with occasional business travel): Mexico City, Monterrey, Bogota.
description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

The Strategy & Planning (S&P) team’s mission is to support DiDi’s mobility business to achieve sustainable growth, by providing insights, driving decisions, leading key projects and setting the rhythm for execution alongside multifunctional teams.

We have a very broad view of the business and we interact with every team in the company to create our know-how. Then we build our mobility strategy, promote cross-functional collaboration, lead key company-wide projects, and executive forums.

In this position, you will support the team in ensuring the execution of strategic initiatives, leading multiple areas through projects with multidisciplinary scopes, in order to promote direction, visibility and alignment among stakeholders.

In the S&P team, you will find a collaborative, high-performance environment, with people engaged and concerned with driving the success of the business.

In this role, you'll be...


Building tools and reports to track and give visibility on strategic initiatives
Running data analysis to support decision making and project prioritization
Analyzing and applying optimization initiatives
Leading, managing and tracking key business projects
Develop in-depth country-level market analysis, incl. regulation change and forecast, competitive landscape, customer/product insight, etc. 
Lead the development and implementation of strategic initiatives. 
Influence key stakeholders across product, operational, functional teams and headquarters to drive towards an aligned winning strategy.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Team player - our success depends on high collaboration
Show proactivity and entrepreneurial attitude: we’re flexible and we move fast, so don’t expect anyone to micromanage you. Just roll up your sleeves and get things done your way
Be organized and pragmatic: you will be dealing with high expectations and a large volume of activities that need to progress in sync, so simplification and prioritization will be keys to success.
Problem solving: break down big problems into small structured problems
Analytics: run analysis to build clear diagnostics
Business acumen: convert analytical diagnostics into practical conclusions and recommendations
Communication: spread the word about conclusions and recommendations, clearly and constructively
Stakeholder management: build strong relationships, understand other’s point of view, lead by influence and handle conflicting interests
Advanced skills with spreadsheets and analytics in general
Fluency English - the position requires daily interaction with foreign stakeholders living in China and abroad
Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Economics or similar fields
3-5 years of experience in management consulting, investment banking, tech companies, business administration, or roles related to strategy and planning.
Potential location base (with occasional business travel): Mexico City, Monterrey, Bogota.



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

title: Consumer Marketing Coordinator
skills: Coordination and execution of social media strategies, content calendars and social cadence
Support in influencer strategy development, talent selection, performance analysis and reporting
Campaign coordination, briefing processes and asset management
Content development workflows and creator ecosystem support
CRM, digital and omnichannel campaign alignment
KPI tracking, reporting, market and competitor analysis
Operational execution, process management and follow-up
Cross-functional coordination with Digital, CRM, PR, E-commerce, Agencies, Corporate and Regional teams

description:
About the job

Description

The Consumer Marketing Coordinator will support the execution and operational management of consumer marketing strategies for MAC Cosmetics, ensuring strong alignment between strategy, execution, performance tracking and daily operations. This role is key to the successful implementation of consumer-facing initiatives across social, influencer marketing, CRM, content, PR activations, digital platforms and omnichannel consumer touchpoints.

The role will be responsible for coordinating and executing core consumer marketing processes, supporting campaign development, product launches, always-on brand strategies, and seasonal activations, ensuring consistency with global and regional frameworks while adapting them to local market needs.

This position requires a highly analytical and strategic operational profile, capable of supporting decision-making through data, performance analysis, market insights, and consumer behavior understanding. A key responsibility is the strategic identification, analysis and evaluation of influencer and talent profiles, based on metrics, performance KPIs, audience relevance, brand fit, content quality, business objectives and consumer segmentation, supporting the development of effective influencer and creator strategies.

The Consumer Marketing Coordinator will play a critical role in the execution of influencer marketing, content ecosystems and creator programs, including coordination, briefing, follow-up, content development, approvals, performance tracking, reporting and operational management of collaborations, campaigns and always-on initiatives.

This role will provide direct strategic and operational support to the Consumer Marketing Manager, assisting in planning, execution, coordination, reporting, performance tracking, and day-to-day operational management of the Consumer Marketing area. It will ensure proper follow-up of timelines, workflows, deliverables, approvals, reporting, cross-functional alignment and daily operational continuity.

Key Responsibilities Include


Coordination and execution of social media strategies, content calendars and social cadence
Support in influencer strategy development, talent selection, performance analysis and reporting
Campaign coordination, briefing processes and asset management
Content development workflows and creator ecosystem support
CRM, digital and omnichannel campaign alignment
KPI tracking, reporting, market and competitor analysis
Operational execution, process management and follow-up
Cross-functional coordination with Digital, CRM, PR, E-commerce, Agencies, Corporate and Regional teams
Support in budget tracking, PRs, operational processes and financial coordination related to consumer initiatives


The role contributes to brand growth by strengthening consumer acquisition, engagement, conversion and retention strategies, ensuring disciplined execution, operational excellence and performance-driven decision-making across all consumer marketing initiatives.

This is a cross-functional, execution-driven, analytical and strategically supportive role, essential for scaling the Consumer Marketing function and enabling high-impact brand activation.

title: Affiliate Marketing Executive for US & Canada market
skills: Identify and actively recruit new affiliate partners and revenue drivers Own a curated portfolio of up to 80–100 affiliate partners, building individual account plans and executing quarterly growth roadmaps for them.

Build and maintain high-value relationships with top affiliate partners through structured touchpoints (QBRs, MBRs, planning & feedback sessions), acting as a strategic growth partner rather than a transactional account manager aiming for long term relationships.

Proactively monitor and optimize affiliate partner performance against key metrics (Revenue, ROAS and AOV), identifying growth opportunities and flagging risk signals such as declining output, fraud or partner inactivity
Develop and execute revenue acceleration plays including seasonal activations, exclusive deals, volume-based commission structures and cross-sell opportunities across geographies.
Ensure affiliate compliance with company policies and brand guidelines across all online channels.
Identify and pursue strategic opportunities to grow Holafly's market presence through high-quality affiliate partnerships.
Experience: 2+ years in Affiliate Marketing, influencer relations, or strategic partnerships
Demonstrated track record of building and nurturing strategic, revenue-driving partnerships across global markets.
Language: Native or professional fluency (C1) in English to lead negotiations in key global markets
Technical Stack: Proficiency with the Impact platform and a strong command of SEO tools (specifically Ahrefs)
Data Analysis: Strong ability to extract insights using Excel and Google Analytics to drive partnership growth
Bachelor's degree in Digital Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
Solution-focused, dynamic, proactive, and ambitious.
Strong written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills.
Excellent project and time management skills.
Technical or digital marketing certifications are a plus.
Background in managing large-scale performance campaigns in the US and Canada
Existing network within the tech or travel industry
Full Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a setup that supports your lifestyle
Flexibility: Results-oriented culture with flexible working hours to ensure work-life harmony
Growth Budget: Dedicated funds for your continuous professional development
Competitive Package: Performance-based bonuses and generous Paid Time Off (PTO)
description:
About the job

Holafly is a fast-growing start-up 🚀that is changing how travelers connect to the internet abroad. ✈ We are a young and international team of over 600 people based worldwide! 🌎

Since 2018, we have helped thousands of travelers by providing global internet to more than 200 worldwide destinations.

About The Position

Holafly is on the hunt for top-tier talent to assist in the global growth of our Affiliate Program. We partner up with a variety of third-parties, and establish a long-term, performance-based partnership with them in order to drive sales to Holafly.Your mission as a Digital Account Executive is to drive growth through strategic affiliate partnerships and campaigns. Leveraging your travel industry expertise, you will create data-driven campaigns to promote travel products and services, maximising revenue and aligning with business goals. By managing affiliate relationships and tapping into regional trends, you’ll expand our brand presence and deliver measurable results in the US and Canadian markets.

Responsibilities Of The Role


Identify and actively recruit new affiliate partners and revenue drivers Own a curated portfolio of up to 80–100 affiliate partners, building individual account plans and executing quarterly growth roadmaps for them.
Build and maintain high-value relationships with top affiliate partners through structured touchpoints (QBRs, MBRs, planning & feedback sessions), acting as a strategic growth partner rather than a transactional account manager aiming for long term relationships.
Proactively monitor and optimize affiliate partner performance against key metrics (Revenue, ROAS and AOV), identifying growth opportunities and flagging risk signals such as declining output, fraud or partner inactivity
Develop and execute revenue acceleration plays including seasonal activations, exclusive deals, volume-based commission structures and cross-sell opportunities across geographies.
Ensure affiliate compliance with company policies and brand guidelines across all online channels.
Identify and pursue strategic opportunities to grow Holafly's market presence through high-quality affiliate partnerships.


Qualifications


Experience: 2+ years in Affiliate Marketing, influencer relations, or strategic partnerships
Demonstrated track record of building and nurturing strategic, revenue-driving partnerships across global markets.
Language: Native or professional fluency (C1) in English to lead negotiations in key global markets
Technical Stack: Proficiency with the Impact platform and a strong command of SEO tools (specifically Ahrefs)
Data Analysis: Strong ability to extract insights using Excel and Google Analytics to drive partnership growth
Bachelor's degree in Digital Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
Solution-focused, dynamic, proactive, and ambitious.
Strong written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills.
Excellent project and time management skills.


Extras


Technical or digital marketing certifications are a plus.
Background in managing large-scale performance campaigns in the US and Canada
Existing network within the tech or travel industry


Perks And Benefits


Full Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a setup that supports your lifestyle
Flexibility: Results-oriented culture with flexible working hours to ensure work-life harmony
Growth Budget: Dedicated funds for your continuous professional development
Competitive Package: Performance-based bonuses and generous Paid Time Off (PTO) 


During a trip to Thailand, Pedro and Lidia, the founders of Holafly, experienced the frustration of not having an internet connection.

Inspired by their own experiences, they came up with a simple but brilliant idea: why not allow travellers to buy data plans for any destination from their home country?

Our passion for providing easy and convenient connectivity to travellers around the world drives everything we do.

We love our work and we do it with pride. Stay connected wherever you go.

title: Business Development Executive I
description:
About the job

Accelerate your career at RXO.

RXO is a leading provider of transportation solutions. With cutting-edge technology at the center, we're revolutionizing the industry with our massive network and commitment to finding solutions for every challenge. We create more efficient ways for shippers and carriers to transport goods across North America.

Does this sound like you? Check out what else RXO has to offer.

Why Join Us

Our Culture

Our values are the key to our unique culture and our ability to deliver for everyone we serve.

We do great things when we are inclusive and work together. To perform with excellence, we learn from one another, value diverse perspectives, operate safely and build strong relationships.

The Next Step

description:
About the job

Job Title: React Developer (Remote)
Work Mode: Fully Remote
Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)




Role Overview:

We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required.




Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices
Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality
Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities
Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines
Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses
Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements




Qualifications

Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome
Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust
Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills
Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline




Eligibility Requirements

Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations:
Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and Tobago, Uruguay, Venezuela




Compensation

Earn up to $34 USD/hr — core project rate with additional performance incentives averaging 7.5% on top
Payments issued weekly via supported payout platforms (e.g., PayPal or AirTM)




Work Arrangement

Fully remote and asynchronous
Flexible workload depending on project availability
Free access to leading AI tools worth $200+/month included




Equal Opportunity Statement Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.




Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

title: Business Development Specialist III
skills: Identificar y adquirir flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis a través de diversos métodos como eventos, reclutamiento de campo, inteligencia de mercado y segmentación de prospectos.
Mantener una comunicación frecuente a través de diferentes canales con las Cuentas (Flotas) asignadas.
Resolver las solicitudes y escalamientos de los socios de flota de manera oportuna y dar seguimiento a las recomendaciones implementadas.
Analizar y rastrear las tendencias y problemas de rendimiento de las flotas, contactándolas proactivamente para ofrecer soluciones que impulsen su eficiencia.
Ser un experto en tu zona y la persona de referencia en tu área de especialidad (Gestión y Soporte de Flotas), compartiendo aprendizajes e información, y ofreciendo recomendaciones.
Apoyar en los procesos con el fin de optimizar la adquisición y el compromiso (engagement) de nuestros socios.
Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación.
Colaborar con diferentes equipos y partes interesadas clave en Uber (Operaciones, Soporte al Cliente, etc.).
Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación.
Experiencia en roles de atención directa al cliente.
Idioma inglés: Básico; Idioma español: Fluido.
Fuertes habilidades de comunicación con capacidad para adaptar el enfoque según se trate de partes interesadas internas o externas.
Sólidas habilidades analíticas y atención al detalle; capacidad para ver tanto "el panorama general" como los detalles minuciosos.
Visión de negocio: Comprender las interrelaciones de las métricas operativas clave, así como el impacto que las decisiones empresariales tienen sobre estas.
Ser organizado, decidido y poseer capacidad de pensamiento crítico.
Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps).
Experiencia previa en Ventas, B2B o Key Account Management.
Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps).
description:
About the job

Sobre el Puesto 

Estamos buscando a una persona altamente motivada y orientada a resultados para unirse a nuestro equipo de Fleet Support Team. Este rol crítico combina la adquisición estratégica con la gestión dedicada de cuentas para impulsar el crecimiento de flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis. Serás una pieza fundamental para expandir nuestro negocio de vehículos en México, construyendo relaciones a largo plazo y de alto impacto con nuestros socios más estratégicos, asegurando su exitosa adquisición, incorporación y crecimiento sostenido en la plataforma. Este rol aprovechará un enfoque hiperlocal y presencial, operando desde una estructura de Greenlight y alineándose estrechamente con nuestro equipo de operaciones.

 Lo que harás 


 Identificar y adquirir flotas de alto valor y asociaciones de taxis a través de diversos métodos como eventos, reclutamiento de campo, inteligencia de mercado y segmentación de prospectos. 
 Mantener una comunicación frecuente a través de diferentes canales con las Cuentas (Flotas) asignadas. 
 Resolver las solicitudes y escalamientos de los socios de flota de manera oportuna y dar seguimiento a las recomendaciones implementadas. 
 Analizar y rastrear las tendencias y problemas de rendimiento de las flotas, contactándolas proactivamente para ofrecer soluciones que impulsen su eficiencia. 
 Ser un experto en tu zona y la persona de referencia en tu área de especialidad (Gestión y Soporte de Flotas), compartiendo aprendizajes e información, y ofreciendo recomendaciones. 
 Apoyar en los procesos con el fin de optimizar la adquisición y el compromiso (engagement) de nuestros socios. 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 
 Colaborar con diferentes equipos y partes interesadas clave en Uber (Operaciones, Soporte al Cliente, etc.). 
 Expandir nuestras relaciones con socios de flota en tu área y adquirir nuevos socios de cooperación. 


 Lo que necesitarás 


 Experiencia en roles de atención directa al cliente. 
 Idioma inglés: Básico; Idioma español: Fluido. 
 Fuertes habilidades de comunicación con capacidad para adaptar el enfoque según se trate de partes interesadas internas o externas. 
 Sólidas habilidades analíticas y atención al detalle; capacidad para ver tanto "el panorama general" como los detalles minuciosos. 
 Visión de negocio: Comprender las interrelaciones de las métricas operativas clave, así como el impacto que las decisiones empresariales tienen sobre estas. 
 Ser organizado, decidido y poseer capacidad de pensamiento crítico. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps). 


 Calificaciones Preferidas 


 Experiencia previa en Ventas, B2B o Key Account Management. 
 Excelentes habilidades interpersonales y capacidad para establecer confianza con las partes interesadas internas y externas (Socios de Flota, Operaciones y CommOps).

title: Account Executive
skills: Manage the end-to-end process of multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and quality standards are met.
Lead the end-to-end workflow by coordinating with all teams involved to ensure smooth project execution.
Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels (from interns to senior leadership) to support the development of creative campaigns.
Track and manage internal project processes using tools such as Excel trackers and Monday.com, and lead regular status updates with project managers and the creative team.
Assist in the development of reports and project documentation.
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration/Marketing/Communication (foundation for analytical and strategic thinking).
Bilingual proficiency (English & Spanish).
Mid Level knowledge of Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, SharePoint.
Proven capability to translate data into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making.
Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs.
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning.
Development programs according to Leadership skills.
Specialized training according to the role.
Learning experiences with internal and external providers.
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others.
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life.
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle.

And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others.
description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

The Account Executive plays a pivotal role in connecting the Creative and Brand teams, ensuring seamless communication and project delivery. This position demands exceptional project management, organization, and data understanding skills.

As the face of the in-house Content Development team for the North America sector, the Account Executive drives the creative adaptation of multiple communication assets in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

Success in this role requires a detail-oriented, collaborative, and client-focused mindset. Someone who thrives on building trust, managing complexity, and delivering excellence under pressure.

Your Impact

As Account Executive your responsibilities would consist of:


Manage the end-to-end process of multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and quality standards are met.
Lead the end-to-end workflow by coordinating with all teams involved to ensure smooth project execution.
Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels (from interns to senior leadership) to support the development of creative campaigns.
Track and manage internal project processes using tools such as Excel trackers and Monday.com, and lead regular status updates with project managers and the creative team.
Assist in the development of reports and project documentation.


Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?


Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration/Marketing/Communication (foundation for analytical and strategic thinking).
Bilingual proficiency (English & Spanish).
Mid Level knowledge of Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, SharePoint.
Proven capability to translate data into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making.


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Quick Commerce leader, Amazon Now MX
skills: 12+ years of product or program management, product marketing, business development or technology experience
6+ years of team management experience
Bachelor's degree
Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
Experience with end to end product delivery
Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
Speak, write, and read fluently in English, and have the ability to take direction in English
Experience engaging and influencing senior executives
description:
About the job

Description

Amazon Now is looking for a MX leader for this business to drive the P&L and the strategy for the short term and long term.

Key job responsibilities

This role is responsible for managing the 3P partnership relationships where business problems, account strategy, and operational direction may not be clearly defined.

A day in the life

The role will manage the P&L, the short term and long term strategy, the relationship with the 3P, a team that overseas product management, account management, marketing, operations and growth. The role will operate with limited guidance, designing solutions and managing plans in the absence of established SOPs for a business in early growth phase. The candidate will have a strong collaboration with Amazon Now WW teams to bring best practices to MX.

About The Team

Inclusive team culture

At Amazon we embrace our differences and we are committed to furthering our culture of inclusion. We host annual and ongoing learning experiences. Amazon’s culture of inclusion is reinforced within our 14 Leadership Principles, which remind team members to seek diverse perspectives, learn and be curious, and earn trust.

Work Life Balance

We believe striking the right balance between your personal and professional life is critical to life-long happiness and fulfillment. We offer flexibility in working hours and encourage you to find your own balance between your work and personal lives.

Mentorship & Career Growth

Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge sharing and mentorship. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects based on what will help each team member develop into a better-rounded professional.

Basic Qualifications


 12+ years of product or program management, product marketing, business development or technology experience
 6+ years of team management experience
 Bachelor's degree
 Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
 Experience with end to end product delivery
 Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
 Speak, write, and read fluently in English, and have the ability to take direction in English


Preferred Qualifications


 Experience engaging and influencing senior executives


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.

title: Paid Media Specialist
skills: Las personas y el buen ambiente de trabajo.
La flexibilidad y la conciliación, que ayuda a equilibrar trabajo y vida personal.
La confianza que se deposita en cada persona, dando libertad y responsabilidad para liderar proyectos y llevarlos al éxito, siempre bajo una filosofía Learning by doing.
Los proyectos retadores y el aprendizaje continuo de la mano de marcas de referencia y de personas expertas del equipo.
El crecimiento profesional y el acompañamiento que ayudan a lograr objetivos y a hacer brillar al equipo.
Diseñarás estrategias creativas y basadas en datos para campañas publicitarias en canales como Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads y otras plataformas relevantes.
Configurarás, monitorearás y optimizarás campañas para garantizar un excelente rendimiento (CPC, ROAS, CPA, entre otros KPIs).
Realizarás análisis detallados del desempeño de las campañas y propondrás mejoras basadas en datos.
Trabajarás de forma cercana con los equipos de contenido, diseño, CRM y performance para asegurar coherencia entre estrategia, creatividad y objetivos comerciales.
Te mantendrás a la vanguardia de las tendencias en publicidad digital, especialmente en el ámbito del comercio electrónico.
Construirás recomendaciones estratégicas que vayan más allá del reporte numérico, priorizando insights claros, síntesis ejecutiva y planes de acción concretos.
Detectarás oportunidades de mejora en segmentación, audiencias, pujas, creativos, estructura de campañas y eficiencia operativa.
Tendrás ownership sobre entregables, análisis y cumplimiento de plazos, manteniendo altos estándares de calidad, criterio y atención al detalle.
Explorarás y aplicarás herramientas de IA y automatización con una mentalidad de mejora continua, buscando formas más inteligentes y eficientes de trabajar.
Seguro Médico de Gastos Médicos mayores, menores y preventivos.
Apoyo psicoemocional y sesiones de psicoterapia a través de CuidadosaMENTE.
Beca completa para formación en Elev8: tendrás acceso gratuito a nuestro campus.
Apoyo económico para estudiar inglés.
Vacaciones superiores a la ley.
Días festivos adicionales a los oficiales, como son el 24 y el 31 de diciembre y el día de tu cumpleaños.
Horario de lunes a jueves de 9-18 horas y los viernes de 9-15 horas aproximadamente, con posibilidad de flexibilizarlo.
Modelo de trabajo híbrido con asistencia a la oficina 2 días por semana y que serán distintos cada semana.
Actividades de equipo organizadas por la Comisión de Fiestas #WeAreFun
Experiencia comprobable en la gestión de campañas de Paid Media para eCommerce (2+ años).
Dominio de plataformas publicitarias como Google Ads, Meta Ads, y experiencia con TikTok Ads y otras herramientas relevantes.
Conocimiento avanzado de métricas clave de eCommerce (ROAS, CPA, CTR, LTV) y habilidades analíticas para interpretar datos de rendimiento.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de análisis como Google Analytics, GTM y/o Data Studio.
Experiencia trabajando campañas de app.
Experiencia en MMPs (AppsFlyer), con entendimiento de attribution, SKAN, calidad de adquisición, deep linking y análisis de performance mobile
Experiencia en campañas Programmatic / DSP (DV360 u otras plataformas), especialmente en estrategias de escala, calidad de tráfico, audiencias y optimización orientada a performance.
Tu foco principal son los resultados.
Buscas aprender de forma constante y te motiva explorar nuevas ideas y enfoques.
Trabajas con autonomía y responsabilidad, te anticipas y tomas la iniciativa para proponer mejoras, optimizar procesos y encontrar soluciones.
Te apetece trabajar en equipo y compartir conocimiento en un entorno colaborativo.
No te limitas a “hacer tu parte”: entiendes el impacto de lo que haces en el equipo, en el cliente y en el negocio.
Estás a gusto trabajando en entornos ágiles y flexibles.
Te identificas con nuestros valores: Empower Talent, Truly Together, Good Vibes, We Love Change y Own It & Make It Happen.
description:
About the job

Elogia es un partner estratégico que transforma las operaciones digitales de las marcas en crecimiento. Lo hace desde el enfoque Full Digital Commerce, que integra marketing, producto y logística.




Pertenece a VIKO, un ecosistema de negocios especializados en impulsar el crecimiento de las marcas desde 1999. Actualmente, está formado por: Elogia, Socialmood, Kraz, Candee, Optopus, Marketing4eCommerce y Elev8.




Oriol Chías, que forma parte del equipo desde el principio, cuenta que VIKO nació porque un grupo de personas que se entendían y disfrutaban trabajando juntas quiso seguir colaborando. Ahí se sembró una cultura People First que nos acompaña hasta hoy.




Ahora, contamos con más de 25 años de trayectoria, oficinas en España y México, y un equipo de más de 300 personas que hacen posible todo esto. 23 de ellas llevan más de 10 años trabajando juntas y 25 decidieron volver al equipo tras un tiempo fuera.




Esto es lo que nos dice el equipo que más valora de trabajar aquí:

Las personas y el buen ambiente de trabajo.
La flexibilidad y la conciliación, que ayuda a equilibrar trabajo y vida personal.
La confianza que se deposita en cada persona, dando libertad y responsabilidad para liderar proyectos y llevarlos al éxito, siempre bajo una filosofía Learning by doing.
Los proyectos retadores y el aprendizaje continuo de la mano de marcas de referencia y de personas expertas del equipo.
El crecimiento profesional y el acompañamiento que ayudan a lograr objetivos y a hacer brillar al equipo.




Actualmente estamos buscando a una persona para el rol de Paid Media Specialist (eCommerce campaigns) en Elogia.




Si te ves formando parte de nuestro ecosistema, sigue leyendo…




🚀¿Cuál será tu misión?

Impulsar el crecimiento de nuestros clientes a través de campañas de Paid Media eficientes, bien ejecutadas y orientadas a resultados, optimizando cada peso invertido para maximizar el rendimiento.




🎯¿Qué harás en tu día a día?

Diseñarás estrategias creativas y basadas en datos para campañas publicitarias en canales como Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads y otras plataformas relevantes.
Configurarás, monitorearás y optimizarás campañas para garantizar un excelente rendimiento (CPC, ROAS, CPA, entre otros KPIs).
Realizarás análisis detallados del desempeño de las campañas y propondrás mejoras basadas en datos.
Trabajarás de forma cercana con los equipos de contenido, diseño, CRM y performance para asegurar coherencia entre estrategia, creatividad y objetivos comerciales.
Te mantendrás a la vanguardia de las tendencias en publicidad digital, especialmente en el ámbito del comercio electrónico.
Construirás recomendaciones estratégicas que vayan más allá del reporte numérico, priorizando insights claros, síntesis ejecutiva y planes de acción concretos.
Detectarás oportunidades de mejora en segmentación, audiencias, pujas, creativos, estructura de campañas y eficiencia operativa.
Tendrás ownership sobre entregables, análisis y cumplimiento de plazos, manteniendo altos estándares de calidad, criterio y atención al detalle.
Explorarás y aplicarás herramientas de IA y automatización con una mentalidad de mejora continua, buscando formas más inteligentes y eficientes de trabajar.




🧩¿Cómo es el equipo con el que trabajarás?

Formarás parte de un equipo de personas con conocimiento especializado en distintas áreas del marketing digital, trabajando en tu día a día de la mano de Maira y Carlos.




✨¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Seguro Médico de Gastos Médicos mayores, menores y preventivos.
Apoyo psicoemocional y sesiones de psicoterapia a través de CuidadosaMENTE.
Beca completa para formación en Elev8: tendrás acceso gratuito a nuestro campus.
Apoyo económico para estudiar inglés.
Vacaciones superiores a la ley.
Días festivos adicionales a los oficiales, como son el 24 y el 31 de diciembre y el día de tu cumpleaños.
Horario de lunes a jueves de 9-18 horas y los viernes de 9-15 horas aproximadamente, con posibilidad de flexibilizarlo.
Modelo de trabajo híbrido con asistencia a la oficina 2 días por semana y que serán distintos cada semana.
Actividades de equipo organizadas por la Comisión de Fiestas #WeAreFun




🔎 ¿Qué necesitamos de ti?




Es indispensable:

Experiencia comprobable en la gestión de campañas de Paid Media para eCommerce (2+ años).
Dominio de plataformas publicitarias como Google Ads, Meta Ads, y experiencia con TikTok Ads y otras herramientas relevantes.
Conocimiento avanzado de métricas clave de eCommerce (ROAS, CPA, CTR, LTV) y habilidades analíticas para interpretar datos de rendimiento.
Experiencia en el uso de herramientas de análisis como Google Analytics, GTM y/o Data Studio.
Experiencia trabajando campañas de app.




No imprescindible, pero suma:

Experiencia en MMPs (AppsFlyer), con entendimiento de attribution, SKAN, calidad de adquisición, deep linking y análisis de performance mobile
Experiencia en campañas Programmatic / DSP (DV360 u otras plataformas), especialmente en estrategias de escala, calidad de tráfico, audiencias y optimización orientada a performance.




Conectarás con el equipo si:

Tu foco principal son los resultados.
Buscas aprender de forma constante y te motiva explorar nuevas ideas y enfoques.
Trabajas con autonomía y responsabilidad, te anticipas y tomas la iniciativa para proponer mejoras, optimizar procesos y encontrar soluciones.
Te apetece trabajar en equipo y compartir conocimiento en un entorno colaborativo.
No te limitas a “hacer tu parte”: entiendes el impacto de lo que haces en el equipo, en el cliente y en el negocio.
Estás a gusto trabajando en entornos ágiles y flexibles.
Te identificas con nuestros valores: Empower Talent, Truly Together, Good Vibes, We Love Change y Own It & Make It Happen.




Celebramos la diversidad y queremos que nuestro equipo refleje esto de manera inclusiva. Nos comprometemos con la igualdad de oportunidades de empleo independientemente de la etnia, religión, sexo, origen nacional, orientación sexual, edad, estado civil, discapacidad, género, identidad o expresión de género.




¡Te esperamos! 😊

title: Business Development
skills: Fortalecer la imagen de HSBC como proveedor líder de soluciones patrimoniales, proporcionando a los clientes acceso a experiencia técnica avanzada en productos.
Apoyar a los RMs para aumentar la confianza de más clientes en las capacidades de HSBC y mejorar la efectividad y la calidad de las necesidades cubiertas para los clientes objetivo.

Asistir a los RMs y ayudar a cerrar ventas, profundizando y haciendo crecer las relaciones con los clientes mediante la identificación y el descubrimiento de necesidades, la identificación de soluciones patrimoniales relevantes y el análisis técnico, y apoyando a los RMs en la presentación y explicación de la(s) solución(es) al cliente.

Realizar revisiones de cartera con los RMs, evaluar la idoneidad de los productos y el impacto de cambios de mercado y regulatorios en los productos mantenidos por los clientes, según corresponda; identificar oportunidades y gestionar riesgos.

Acompañar a los RMs en 3 a 5 reuniones diarias con clientes y aportar asesoramiento e información basada en conocimiento técnico, actuando como segundo punto de contacto para los RMs en productos y soluciones específicas.
Mínimo de un año de experiencia laboral como especialista de producto o asesor/a financiero/a.
Sólidas habilidades de atención al cliente, con capacidad para ofrecer una experiencia destacada y soluciones basadas en necesidades.

Conocimiento profundo de soluciones y productos financieros complejos específicos, incluyendo conocimiento de mercados financieros, dinámicas socioeconómicas y requisitos regulatorios relevantes para los productos.
Amplia visión del mercado externo sobre condiciones de mercado, nuevas soluciones de producto y comprensión de la actividad actual de los mercados financieros.
Capacidad y experiencia demostradas para identificar correctamente las necesidades del cliente.
Habilidades sólidas para gestionar un proceso de ventas consultivo.
Sólida comprensión de los estándares globales de prevención de blanqueo de capitales (AML).
Trabajo en equipo y habilidades de colaboración.
Conocimiento de regulaciones de cumplimiento locales y del Grupo.
Especialización en una o más categorías de producto, p. ej.: Productos Estructurados/FX/Inversiones/Planificación Financiera/Jubilación/Protección/Hipotecas, etc.
description:
About the job

Please note this job advertisement is only available in Spanish. To view the job, select ‘Español - ES’ from the language selector in the page menu.

El BDM suele desplegarse para aportar valor a clientes con necesidades más complejas, p. ej., clientes P&A, W, PCS, PE, y se asigna a un equipo de Premier Relationship Managers (RMs). Aunque los RMs son responsables del proceso integral de asesoramiento y ventas con los clientes, el BDM les ayuda a comprender mejor a los clientes, a reunirse con ellos junto con los RMs cuando sea necesario, a formular recomendaciones adecuadas y a ayudar a los clientes a entender el valor y los riesgos de las soluciones disponibles.

En ocasiones, el BDM también puede impartir formación de producto para apoyar y ejecutar lanzamientos de nuevos productos, y liderar eventos de educación para clientes para ayudarles a adquirir un mejor conocimiento de los mercados financieros y de las soluciones financieras. El BDM también debe seguir el proceso de ventas basado en necesidades, ofreciendo a los clientes una experiencia patrimonial significativa y consistente y, en última instancia, una experiencia sobresaliente.

Responsabilidades principales


Fortalecer la imagen de HSBC como proveedor líder de soluciones patrimoniales, proporcionando a los clientes acceso a experiencia técnica avanzada en productos.
Apoyar a los RMs para aumentar la confianza de más clientes en las capacidades de HSBC y mejorar la efectividad y la calidad de las necesidades cubiertas para los clientes objetivo.
Asistir a los RMs y ayudar a cerrar ventas, profundizando y haciendo crecer las relaciones con los clientes mediante la identificación y el descubrimiento de necesidades, la identificación de soluciones patrimoniales relevantes y el análisis técnico, y apoyando a los RMs en la presentación y explicación de la(s) solución(es) al cliente.
Realizar revisiones de cartera con los RMs, evaluar la idoneidad de los productos y el impacto de cambios de mercado y regulatorios en los productos mantenidos por los clientes, según corresponda; identificar oportunidades y gestionar riesgos.
Acompañar a los RMs en 3 a 5 reuniones diarias con clientes y aportar asesoramiento e información basada en conocimiento técnico, actuando como segundo punto de contacto para los RMs en productos y soluciones específicas.


Conocimientos y experiencia


Mínimo de un año de experiencia laboral como especialista de producto o asesor/a financiero/a.
Sólidas habilidades de atención al cliente, con capacidad para ofrecer una experiencia destacada y soluciones basadas en necesidades.
Conocimiento profundo de soluciones y productos financieros complejos específicos, incluyendo conocimiento de mercados financieros, dinámicas socioeconómicas y requisitos regulatorios relevantes para los productos.
Amplia visión del mercado externo sobre condiciones de mercado, nuevas soluciones de producto y comprensión de la actividad actual de los mercados financieros.
Capacidad y experiencia demostradas para identificar correctamente las necesidades del cliente.
Habilidades sólidas para gestionar un proceso de ventas consultivo.
Sólida comprensión de los estándares globales de prevención de blanqueo de capitales (AML).
Trabajo en equipo y habilidades de colaboración.
Conocimiento de regulaciones de cumplimiento locales y del Grupo.
Especialización en una o más categorías de producto, p. ej.: Productos Estructurados/FX/Inversiones/Planificación Financiera/Jubilación/Protección/Hipotecas, etc.


Ofrecemos.

Contratación directa por parte del Banco.

Sueldo base, bono trimestral por desempeño, aguinaldo, prima vacacional, seguro de vida, seguro de gastos médicos mayores, créditos, descuentos en los productos del Banco, participación activa en programas de sustentabilidad/ responsabilidad social, descuentos en más de 9,000 establecimientos y un plan de carrera acorde a tus aspiraciones.

“En HSBC esperamos que nuestra gente se trate con dignidad y respeto, creando una cultura incluyente que promueva igualdad de oportunidades. Nuestros valores definen quiénes somos como organización y lo que nos distingue, valoramos la diferencia, avanzamos juntos, nos hacemos responsables de nuestras acciones, usamos el buen juicio, hacemos lo correcto y hacemos que las cosas sucedan”.

“En HSBC nos encontramos orientados a garantizar la igualdad de género y capacitación constante hacia nuestros empleados, así como a la protección de sus derechos laborarles y sociales”.

“En HSBC ofrecemos a nuestros colegas un mayor número de días para que puedan disfrutar al máximo su boda, cuidar al nuevo integrante de la familia, o vivir el duelo por la pérdida de algún familiar”.

Nuestro paquete de permisos con goce de sueldo está a la vanguardia en México.

Ahora tienes una razón más para ser HSBC y vivir con orgullo una cultura de bienestar integral, balance y auto cuidado”.

“¡Queremos que formes parte de nuestro equipo! ¡Descubre cómo es trabajar con nosotros!"

title: Senior Market Manager
skills: Build, manage and expand partner relationships within your territory, aiming to surpass quarterly sales targets.
Conduct regular optimization calls and business reviews with partners to develop strong, enduring partnerships providing exceptional, timely service to hosts, including in-person support as needed.
Implement strategies to effectively manage and optimize strategic partnerships.
Prospect and onboard new, high-quality supply within your assigned geography.
Educate clients on all significant product updates and cascade feedback on product and public policy to the relevant internal stakeholders.
Leverage data to identify and pursue strategic growth opportunities, demonstrating an ability to navigate operational complexities and efficiently allocate resources.
Use an entrepreneurial approach to develop and implement unique engagement projects, fostering innovation within your territory.
Work cross-functionally with teams such as product, communications, public policy, legal, tax and customer support to ensure Airbnb's long-term market success.
Acquire comprehensive knowledge of local market trends to inform both internal and external stakeholders.
Understand the technical aspects of software partnerships to offer comprehensive support, ensuring a seamless experience for hosts and guests.
Represent Airbnb in external meetings with Hosts and at industry conferences in your market, solidifying the brand's presence and commitment.
Support host community programs in your region, contributing to the growth and engagement of Airbnb's community.
8+ years of experience in new sales, account management, and partner support, showcasing a deep understanding and capability in fostering business relationships.
2+ years of tech/travel industry experience is a plus, highlighting the value of sector-specific knowledge.
Proven track record of being able to effectively work a leads pipeline and a book of business, demonstrating expertise in nurturing and converting potential opportunities.
Proficient quantitative skills and proven ability to interpret and apply data throughout your day-to-day work, emphasizing the importance of data-driven decision-making.
The ability to work at both strategic and tactical levels, with a proven track record to execute in ambiguous environments, highlighting adaptability and strategic foresight.
Proven experience working cross-functionally, ensuring the ability to collaborate effectively with various teams to drive collective success.
Excellent communication and presentation skills and the ability to communicate effectively with clients via phone, email, and in-person, underscoring the importance of strong interpersonal skills.

Charismatic self-starter who is resourceful and self-sufficient, paired with strong time management and prioritization skills, showcasing the initiative and organizational capabilities required for the role.

Highly proficient in using CRM software, specifically in working with leads, opportunities, and other core objects - Salesforce experience is a plus, indicating the technical tools proficiency needed for effective relationship management.
Based in Quintana Roo or Merida, and must be willing to regularly travel to your assigned geos. Typical expectation would be once every quarter.
Passion for Airbnb, travel, and the sharing economy - being an Airbnb host is a plus, culminating the profile with a personal alignment and enthusiasm for the company's mission and sector.
description:
About the job

Airbnb was born in 2007 when two hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 5 million hosts who have welcomed over 2 billion guest arrivals in almost every country across the globe. Every day, hosts offer unique stays and experiences that make it possible for guests to connect with communities in a more authentic way.

The Community You Will Join

Our Supply Team is growing, and we want you to be part of it! As a Senior Market Manager, you will play a crucial role in the retention, growth, and optimization of host entrepreneurs and rising hosts in your assigned territory. You will focus on building strong relationships with these hosts, helping them optimize their listings, improve pricing strategies, and enhance their overall success on Airbnb.

The Difference You Will Make

As a Senior Market Manager, your role will entail ensuring the health and expansion of our supply in the Mexican Caribbean region. This will involve managing Hosts and acquiring high-quality inventory. Your focus will be to enhance Airbnb's market presence in your designated region through collaboration with other teams and leveraging your expertise on the local market. With a deep understanding of Airbnb's mission and values, you will oversee all aspects of supply acquisition and market success. This includes developing acquisition strategies, and managing relationships with strategic partners, including the creation of new partnerships. You will also be tasked with developing and refining scalable, localized supply management strategies for both established, competitive markets and emerging, untapped markets, aiming to secure our long-term success in these regions.

A Typical Day


Build, manage and expand partner relationships within your territory, aiming to surpass quarterly sales targets.
Conduct regular optimization calls and business reviews with partners to develop strong, enduring partnerships providing exceptional, timely service to hosts, including in-person support as needed.
Implement strategies to effectively manage and optimize strategic partnerships. 
Prospect and onboard new, high-quality supply within your assigned geography.
Educate clients on all significant product updates and cascade feedback on product and public policy to the relevant internal stakeholders.
Leverage data to identify and pursue strategic growth opportunities, demonstrating an ability to navigate operational complexities and efficiently allocate resources.
Use an entrepreneurial approach to develop and implement unique engagement projects, fostering innovation within your territory.
Work cross-functionally with teams such as product, communications, public policy, legal, tax and customer support to ensure Airbnb's long-term market success.
Acquire comprehensive knowledge of local market trends to inform both internal and external stakeholders.
Understand the technical aspects of software partnerships to offer comprehensive support, ensuring a seamless experience for hosts and guests.
Represent Airbnb in external meetings with Hosts and at industry conferences in your market, solidifying the brand's presence and commitment.
Support host community programs in your region, contributing to the growth and engagement of Airbnb's community.


Your Expertise


8+ years of experience in new sales, account management, and partner support, showcasing a deep understanding and capability in fostering business relationships.
2+ years of tech/travel industry experience is a plus, highlighting the value of sector-specific knowledge.
Proven track record of being able to effectively work a leads pipeline and a book of business, demonstrating expertise in nurturing and converting potential opportunities.
Proficient quantitative skills and proven ability to interpret and apply data throughout your day-to-day work, emphasizing the importance of data-driven decision-making.
The ability to work at both strategic and tactical levels, with a proven track record to execute in ambiguous environments, highlighting adaptability and strategic foresight.
Proven experience working cross-functionally, ensuring the ability to collaborate effectively with various teams to drive collective success.
Excellent communication and presentation skills and the ability to communicate effectively with clients via phone, email, and in-person, underscoring the importance of strong interpersonal skills.
Charismatic self-starter who is resourceful and self-sufficient, paired with strong time management and prioritization skills, showcasing the initiative and organizational capabilities required for the role.
Highly proficient in using CRM software, specifically in working with leads, opportunities, and other core objects - Salesforce experience is a plus, indicating the technical tools proficiency needed for effective relationship management.
Based in Quintana Roo or Merida, and must be willing to regularly travel to your assigned geos. Typical expectation would be once every quarter.
Passion for Airbnb, travel, and the sharing economy - being an Airbnb host is a plus, culminating the profile with a personal alignment and enthusiasm for the company's mission and sector.


Our Commitment To Inclusion & Belonging

Airbnb is committed to working with the broadest talent pool possible. We believe diverse ideas foster innovation and engagement, and allow us to attract creatively-led people, and to develop the best products, services and solutions. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.

How We'll Take Care Of You

Our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay is dependent upon many factors, such as: training, transferable skills, work experience, business needs and market demands. The base pay range shown below is monthly, is subject to change and may be modified in the future. This role may also be eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits.

Mexico Monthly Pay Range

$100,000—$125,000 MXN
